positive: A mystical celestial forest scene, depicting giant bioluminescent flora and fauna set against a twilight backdrop. The composition must feature strong, clean silhouettes and central elements, designed as a repeating, seamless print pattern. Focus on deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and radiant gold accents emanating from glowing mushrooms and crystalline leaves. The art style should be a hyper-detailed blend of Art Nouveau and psychedelic fantasy, utilizing strong contrast (chiaroscuro) to make the glowing elements pop. Intricate mandala-like details integrated into the natural structures. Digital painting, perfect symmetry, suitable for t-shirt printing.
negative: low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, blurry, artifact, noise, text, watermark, signature, poorly rendered hands, cropped, out of focus, asymmetrical
